inputs.label: Fabric Width (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Standard industrial fabric roll width, typically 150-320 cm for apparel and upholstery.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard industrial fabric roll width, typically 150-320 cm for apparel and upholstery.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart endüstriyel kumaş rulo genişliği, giyim ve döşemelik için tipik olarak 150-320 cm.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardindustrielle Stoffrollenbreite, typischerweise 150-320 cm für Bekleidung und Polster.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur standard d'un rouleau de tissu industriel, généralement 150-320 cm pour l'habillement et l'ameublement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho estándar industrial del rollo de tela, típicamente 150-320 cm para prendas de vestir y tapicería.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عرض لفة القماش الصناعي القياسي، عادة 150-320 سم للملابس والتنجيد.

inputs.label: Fabric Length (m)
inputs.businessContext: Total length of fabric roll or batch, used to compute total area.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total length of fabric roll or batch, used to compute total area.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kumaş rulosu veya partisinin toplam uzunluğu, toplam alanı hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtlänge der Stoffrolle oder -charge, zur Berechnung der Gesamtfläche.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur totale du rouleau ou lot de tissu, utilisée pour calculer la surface totale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud total del rollo o lote de tela, utilizada para calcular el área total.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الطول الإجمالي للفة القماش أو الدفعة، يُستخدم لحساب المساحة الكلية.

inputs.label: Pattern Length (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Length of one garment or component pattern piece along the grain.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of one garment or component pattern piece along the grain.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir giysi veya bileşen kalıp parçasının damar yönü boyunca uzunluğu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Länge eines Kleidungsstücks oder Komponentenschnittteils entlang des Fadenlaufs.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur d'une pièce de patron de vêtement ou de composant dans le sens du fil.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud de una pieza de prenda o componente de patrón a lo largo del hilo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: طول قطعة النمط الواحدة للملابس أو المكون على طول النسيج.

inputs.label: Pattern Width (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Width of one pattern piece perpendicular to the grain.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of one pattern piece perpendicular to the grain.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir kalıp parçasının damar yönüne dik genişliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Breite eines Schnittteils senkrecht zum Fadenlauf.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur d'une pièce de patron perpendiculairement au sens du fil.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho de una pieza de patrón perpendicular al hilo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عرض قطعة النمط الواحدة بشكل عمودي على النسيج.

inputs.label: Quantity to Cut
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical pieces to be cut from the fabric.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of identical pieces to be cut from the fabric.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl identischer Teile, die aus dem Stoff geschnitten werden sollen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de pièces identiques à découper dans le tissu.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de piezas idénticas a cortar de la tela.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد القطع المتطابقة التي سيتم قصها من القماش.

inputs.label: Cutting Method
inputs.businessContext: Method affects material utilization and labor cost. Single-ply is manual; multi-ply is automated.

businessContext_i18n.en: Method affects material utilization and labor cost. Single-ply is manual; multi-ply is automated.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yöntem, malzeme kullanımını ve işçilik maliyetini etkiler. Tek kat manuel, çok kat otomatiktir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das Verfahren beeinflusst Materialausnutzung und Arbeitskosten. Einzellage ist manuell, Mehrlage automatisiert.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La méthode affecte l'utilisation de la matière et le coût de main-d'œuvre. Simple épaisseur est manuelle ; multi-épaisseur est automatisée.
businessContext_i18n.es: El método afecta la utilización del material y el costo de mano de obra. Una capa es manual; multicapa es automatizado.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تؤثر الطريقة على استخدام المواد وتكلفة العمالة. القص الأحادي يدوي؛ المتعدد آلي.

inputs.label: Material Cost per m²
inputs.businessContext: Cost of fabric per square meter, used for financial loss calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of fabric per square meter, used for financial loss calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Metrekare başına kumaş maliyeti, finansal kayıp hesaplamaları için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Stoffkosten pro Quadratmeter, verwendet für finanzielle Verlustberechnungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût du tissu par mètre carré, utilisé pour les calculs de perte financière.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo de la tela por metro cuadrado, utilizado para cálculos de pérdida financiera.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكلفة القماش لكل متر مربع، تُستخدم لحساب الخسائر المالية.

inputs.label: Labor Rate per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage of cutting operator, used for labor cost estimation.

label_i18n.es: Tarifa de mano de obra por hora

businessContext_i18n.en: Hourly wage of cutting operator, used for labor cost estimation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesim operatörünün saatlik ücreti, işçilik maliyeti tahmini için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Stundenlohn des Zuschneiders, verwendet für Arbeitskostenschätzung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Salaire horaire de l'opérateur de coupe, utilisé pour l'estimation du coût de main-d'œuvre.
businessContext_i18n.es: Salario por hora del operador de corte, utilizado para estimación de costo de mano de obra.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الأجر بالساعة لعامل القص، يُستخدم لتقدير تكلفة العمالة.

rules.message: Pattern width must not exceed fabric width.
Quantity must be greater than zero.
Multi-ply cutting is recommended for quantities of 10 or more.

thresholds.message: Waste exceeds 15% – review nesting or pattern layout.
Material cost exceeds 10,000 currency units – consider alternative fabric.
Fabric utilization below 70% – optimize nesting or reduce allowance.

hiddenLossDrivers: Composite model — validate each cost leg against actuals
Physical exposure factors are normalized estimates
suggestedActions: Reconcile labor and maintenance legs separately
Benchmark noise/vibration factors with site measurement
